account.title: My Account
account.subtitle: Manage your personal information and logo
account.avatarHint: JPG, PNG or GIF — max 2 MB
account.avatarTooBigDesc: Please choose an image under 2 MB.
account.planUpdatedDesc: Your account has been switched to the {{plan}} plan.

landing.tagline: NFC & QR Review Cards for Modern Businesses
landing.heroDesc: AvisMaker smart cards let customers leave reviews on Google, TripAdvisor, Airbnb, and Trustpilot with a single tap or scan, without any app required.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to collect reviews
landing.featuresDesc: No more hoping customers remember to leave a review. AvisMaker makes it effortless.
landing.howItWorksDesc: Get your first review in under 5 minutes
landing.ctaDesc: Join 2,400+ businesses using AvisMaker to grow their online reputation.

features.nfcQrDesc: Physical cards that work with any smartphone. Customers tap or scan to instantly leave a review.
features.multiPlatformDesc: Google, TripAdvisor, Airbnb, Trustpilot: route customers to any review platform you choose.
features.smartFlowDesc: Unhappy customer? Capture feedback privately instead of sending them to your public review page.
features.aiReplyDesc: Generate professional responses to every review in seconds with built-in AI assistance.
features.multiLocationDesc: Manage cards for multiple locations from one dashboard. Perfect for chains and franchises.
features.analyticsDesc: Track scan counts, review conversion, and identify your best performing cards.

steps.step1Desc: Enter your card's unique activation code to claim it.
steps.step2Desc: Connect your Google, Airbnb, or TripAdvisor review page.
steps.step3Desc: Customers tap or scan and leave a review instantly.

auth.signInToContinue: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.quoteDesc: Join thousands of businesses turning every customer interaction into a review opportunity.
auth.createAccountDesc: Start collecting reviews in minutes, for free
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you reset instructions.
auth.resetEmailDesc: If an account exists with that email, you'll receive reset instructions shortly.
auth.passwordRequirements: Use at least 8 characters with a mix of letters and numbers.
auth.checkEmailDesc: If an account with that email exists, we sent a password reset link.
auth.resetPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.noCreditCard: No credit card required for the free plan.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noActivityDesc: Scans will appear here as customers interact with your cards.

cards.title: My Cards
cards.subtitle: Manage your NFC and QR review cards
cards.noCardsDesc: Activate your first NFC / QR review card to start collecting reviews automatically.
cards.cardUpdatedDesc: Your card settings have been saved.
cards.nicknamePlaceholder: e.g. Main Entrance, Counter, VIP Table...
cards.nicknameHint: A custom name to easily identify this card in your dashboard.
cards.createProfileHint: Create a profile to link to this card
cards.profileHint: Link this card to one of your business locations.
cards.targetUrlHint: The URL customers will be redirected to when they scan the card.
cards.smartReviewHint: Show a rating screen before redirecting to the review platform

filter.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your search or filters.

profiles.title: Business Profiles
profiles.subtitle: Manage your business information for each location
profiles.noProfilesDesc: Create a business profile to organize your review cards by location.
profiles.name: Business Name
profiles.deleteDesc: The profile "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. Cards linked to it will not be deleted but will lose their association. This action is irreversible.
profiles.profileCreatedDesc: Your business profile has been created.
profiles.descriptionPlaceholder: A short description of your business...
profiles.noLinkedCardsDesc: Link a NFC/QR card to this profile from the card page.
profiles.detachCardDesc: Card {{code}} will no longer be linked to this profile. The card is not deleted and can be re-linked at any time.
profiles.detachSuccessDesc: Card {{code}} is no longer linked to this profile.

billing.title: Billing & Plans
billing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business
billing.planUpdatedDesc: You are now on the {{plan}} plan ({{billing}}).
billing.updateFailedDesc: Unable to change plan. Please try again.
billing.annualSavings: Save 3 months by switching to annual billing
billing.footer: All prices in EUR. Cancel anytime.

activate.title: Activate your card
activate.subtitle: Enter the activation code printed on your card
activate.successDesc: Your card is now active and ready to collect reviews.
activate.notFound: Card not found. Check your activation code.
activate.codeHintAlt: The code is printed on the back of your card or in your order confirmation email.
activate.hint1: On your physical NFC / QR card

activate.alreadyActiveDesc: This card is already registered to another account.
activate.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
activate.codeHint: The code is printed on the back of your card in the format XX-XXXXXX

aiReply.title: AI Reply Generator
aiReply.subtitle: Generate professional responses to customer reviews

aiReply.upgradeDesc: AI Reply is available on Premium and above.
aiReply.generateFailedDesc: Could not generate reply. Please try again.
aiReply.emptyState: Your generated reply will appear here
aiReply.emptyStateDesc: Paste a review and click Generate
aiReply.tip1: Always thank the customer for their time
aiReply.tip2: Address specific points from their review
